title: Robust Spicy British Mung Bean Sprouts Ploughmans
description: A spicy and chewy British dish featuring mung bean sprouts, infused oil, and ayurvedic rajasic friendly ingredients, served in a ploughmans style with a ti leaf wrap.
instructions: Rinse the mung bean sprouts and soak them in water for 30 minutes.
Heat the infused oil in a pan over medium heat and saute the chili peppers and ginger until fragrant.
Add the mung bean sprouts to the pan and stir fry until they are tender and slightly browned.
In a small bowl, whisk together the apple cider vinegar, sea salt, and black pepper to make the dressing.
To assemble the ploughmans, place a portion of the mung bean sprouts onto a ti leaf, followed by a spoonful of the dressing and a sprinkle of red onion.
Fold the ti leaf over the filling to create a wrap and serve immediately.
Garnish with additional chili peppers and ginger if desired.
Serve with a side of crusty bread or crackers for a hearty dinner.
